window_summary: This window tracks the recent Kong/insomnia release stream from 11.5.0-beta.0 through 12.6.0, covering beta iterations, stable releases, and feature introductions such as external vault support, MCP client, LLM integrations, and Konnect sync.

* feat: add data folder constraint for read file tags - INS-1062 by @ihexxa in https://github.com/Kong/insomnia/pull/8953
* fix: enable dataFolders constraint for CLI - INS-1064 by @ihexxa in https://github.com/Kong/insomnia/pull/8955

* Fix templating worker database issue by @cwangsmv in https://github.com/Kong/insomnia/...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Kong/insomnia release core@11.5.0-beta.0, the team delivers a beta that includes session exposure fixes, replacement of lodash with es-toolkit, bulk project import support, improved undo changes confirmation with file count details, OAuth authorize using system browser, external vault separation and bundle plugin support, a React Router SPA mode architecture change, data folder constraints for file access, Electron bumps to 36 and 37, and various UI and performance improvements.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Kong/insomnia release core@11.6.0-beta.0, the team fixes workspace deletion errors, race conditions when switching projects, improves Postman script translation, removes nunjucks context API, refactors database get descendants, bumps Vite to v7, refines error messages for file imports, prunes database methods, removes fromSync hack, improves TypeScript, puts collection filter into localStorage, provides more user-friendly Swagger file error messages, redirects to organization page if project not found, cleans unused notification calls, creates submit hook with factory, adds auth for socket.io, fixes Playwright warnings, updates Electron to 37, updates tab after moving request, improves commit modal and uncommitted modal, adds initModel to findOne, fixes issue where pulling/discarding changes on a Git Project would remove metadata or private environments, includes token as backup credential when initially fetching repo contents, bumps electron-builder, improves wording for Security Whitelist Error Message, and resolves git merge conflicts change by change.
